LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, AS CONCEDED BY PLAINTIFF. THE REMAINDER OF THE MOTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BATTERY AND THAT CLAIM IS NOT SUBJECT TO THE MICRA LIMITATIONS. SEE PERRY V. SHAW (2001) 88 CAL.APP.4TH 658. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

APPEARANCES - ATTY. REBECCA COLEMAN OF MOSELEY COLLINS, TEL. NO. (916) 444-4444 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff states a cause of action for battery. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. REBECCA COLEMAN OF MOSELEY COLLINS, TEL. NO. (916) 444-4444 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - The motion to strike is granted as to the prayer for punitive damages, as conceded by Plaintiff. The remainder of the motion is denied. Plaintiff states a cause of action for battery and that claim is not subject to the MICRA limitations. See Perry v. Shaw (2001) 88 Cal.App.4th 658. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
